SELECT s.School AS school_name,

       s.Phone AS phone_number,
       avg_write.avg_writing
FROM schools s

    FROM satscores sc2

    WHERE (s2.OpenDate > '1991-12-31' OR s2.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01')

49:
WITH closed_schools AS (
    SELECT County, School, ClosedDate
    FROM schools
    WHERE StatusType = 'Closed'
),
county_counts AS (
    SELECT County, COUNT(*) AS closed_cnt
    FROM closed_schools
    GROUP BY County
),
max_count AS (
    SELECT MAX(closed_cnt) AS max_cnt
    FROM county_counts
)
SELECT cs.School, cs.ClosedDate
FROM closed_schools cs
JOIN county_counts cc ON cs.County = cc.County
JOIN max_count mc ON cc.closed_cnt = mc.max_cnt
ORDER BY cs.School;	----- bird -----	california_schools

WITH admins AS (
  SELECT AdmFName1 AS first_name, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName1 IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(AdmFName1) <> ''
  UNION ALL
  SELECT AdmFName2, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(AdmFName2) <> ''
  UNION ALL
  SELECT AdmFName3, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName3 IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(AdmFName3) <> ''
),
top_names AS (
  SELECT first_name FROM admins GROUP BY first_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 2
)
SELECT DISTINCT a.first_name, a.District
FROM admins a
JOIN top_names t ON a.first_name = t.first_name
ORDER BY a.first_name, a.District;	----- bird -----	california_schools

94:
WITH oldest_female AS (
    SELECT client_id
    FROM client
    WHERE gender = 'F'
      AND birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F')
),
lowest_salary AS (
    SELECT OF.client_id
    FROM oldest_female OF
    JOIN district D ON OF.district_id = D.district_id
    WHERE D.A11 = (
        SELECT MIN(D2.A11)
        FROM oldest_female OF2
        JOIN district D2 ON OF2.district_id = D2.district_id
    )
),
account_list AS (
    SELECT Disp.account_id
    FROM disp Disp
    JOIN lowest_salary LS ON Disp.client_id = LS.client_id
),
salary_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        (SELECT MAX(A11) FROM district) AS max_sal,
        (SELECT MIN(D.A11)
         FROM oldest_female OF
         JOIN district D ON OF.district_id = D.district_id) AS min_sal
)
SELECT AL.account_id, (SS.max_sal - SS.min_sal) AS gap
FROM account_list AL
CROSS JOIN salary_stats SS;	----- bird -----	financial

        WHERE b.bond_type = ' = '

330:
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN cnt = 0 THEN 0 
       ELSE carcinogenic_cnt * 100.0 / cnt 
  END AS percentage
FROM (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS cnt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN m.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS carcinogenic_cnt
  FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id
    FROM `atom` a
    JOIN `connected` c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id OR a.atom_id = c.atom_id2
    JOIN `bond` b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
    WHERE a.element = 'h' AND b.bond_type = '#'
  ) hm
  JOIN `molecule` m ON hm.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
);	----- bird -----	toxicology

),
story_no_text AS (
  SELECT id FROM cards WHERE isStorySpotlight = 1 AND isTextless = 0
)

       ( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM story_no_text) * 100.0 /
         (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM story) ) AS percentage
FROM story_no_text snt
ORDER BY snt.id;	----- bird -----	card_games

       CAST(t.spanish_cards AS REAL) * 100.0 / t.total_cards AS percentage_spanish
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data f ON c.uuid = f.uuid
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT 
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cards) AS total_cards,
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c2.uuid) 
         FROM cards c2 
         JOIN foreign_data f2 ON c2.uuid = f2.uuid 
         WHERE f2.language = 'Spanish') AS spanish_cards
) t
WHERE f.language = 'Spanish'
ORDER BY c.name;	----- bird -----	card_games

518:
WITH banned_counts AS (
  SELECT format, COUNT(*) AS banned_cnt
  FROM legalities
  WHERE status = 'Banned'
  GROUP BY format
),
max_banned AS (
  SELECT MAX(banned_cnt) AS max_cnt
  FROM banned_counts
)
SELECT bc.format, c.name
FROM banned_counts bc
JOIN max_banned mb ON bc.banned_cnt = mb.max_cnt
JOIN legalities l ON l.format = bc.format AND l.status = 'Banned'
JOIN cards c ON c.uuid = l.uuid
ORDER BY bc.format, c.name;	----- bird -----	card_games

    (CAST(SUBSTR(r.fastestLapTime, 1, INSTR(r.fastestLapTime, ':')-1) AS REAL) * 60) +
    CAST(SUBSTR(r.fastestLapTime, INSTR(r.fastestLapTime, ':')+1, INSTR(r.fastestLapTime, '.') - INSTR(r.fastestLapTime, ':') -1) AS REAL) +
    CAST(SUBSTR(r.fastestLapTime, INSTR(r.fastestLapTime, '.')+1) AS REAL)/1000
) AS avg_fastest_lap_time_seconds
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton'
  AND r.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
  AND r.fastestLapTime <> '';	----- bird -----	formula_1

944:
WITH race AS (
  SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
),
times AS (
  SELECT
    position,
    CASE
      WHEN instr(time, ':') > 0 THEN
        CASE
          WHEN instr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), ':') > 0 THEN
            CAST(substr(time, 1, instr(time, ':')-1) AS REAL) * 3600 +
            CAST(substr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), 1, instr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), ':')-1) AS REAL) * 60 +
            CAST(
              CASE
                WHEN instr(substr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), instr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), ':')+1), '.') > 0 THEN
                  substr(substr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), instr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), ':')+1), 1, instr(substr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), instr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), ':')+1), '.')-1)
                ELSE
                  substr(substr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), instr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), ':')+1), 1)
              END AS REAL) +
            CASE
              WHEN instr(substr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), instr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), ':')+1), '.') > 0 THEN
                CAST(substr(substr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), instr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), ':')+1), instr(substr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), instr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), ':')+1), '.')+1) AS REAL) / 1000
              ELSE 0
            END
          ELSE
            CAST(substr(time, 1, instr(time, ':')-1) AS REAL) * 60 +
            CAST(
              CASE
                WHEN instr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), '.') > 0 THEN
                  substr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), 1, instr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), '.')-1)
                ELSE
                  substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1)
              END AS REAL) +
            CASE
              WHEN instr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), '.') > 0 THEN
                CAST(substr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), instr(substr(time, instr(time, ':')+1), '.')+1) AS REAL) / 1000
              ELSE 0
            END
        END
      ELSE
        CAST(
          CASE
            WHEN instr(time, '.') > 0 THEN
              substr(time, 1, instr(time, '.')-1)
            ELSE
              time
          END AS REAL) +
        CASE
          WHEN instr(time, '.') > 0 THEN
            CAST(substr(time, instr(time, '.')+1) AS REAL) / 1000
          ELSE 0
        END
    END AS total_seconds
  FROM results
  WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM race)
    AND time IS NOT NULL
),
champ AS (
  SELECT total_seconds FROM times WHERE position = 1
),
last AS (
  SELECT total_seconds FROM times ORDER BY position DESC LIMIT 1
)
SELECT (( (SELECT total_seconds FROM last) - (SELECT total_seconds FROM champ) ) / (SELECT total_seconds FROM last) ) * 100 AS percent_faster;	----- bird -----	formula_1

WITH yearly AS (
    SELECT ym.CustomerID, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    WHERE substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013'
    GROUP BY ym.CustomerID
),
seg_min AS (
    SELECT c.Segment, MIN(y.total_consumption) AS min_consumption
    FROM yearly y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
    GROUP BY c.Segment
)
SELECT
    MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='SME' THEN min_consumption END) -
    MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='LAM' THEN min_consumption END) AS diff_SME_LAM,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='LAM' THEN min_consumption END) -
    MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='KAM' THEN min_consumption END) AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='KAM' THEN min_consumption END) -
    MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='SME' THEN min_consumption END) AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM seg_min;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT 'biggest' AS type, Segment
FROM (
  SELECT c.Segment,
         ((SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
           SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0) /
         NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END),0) AS pct_increase
  FROM yearmonth ym
  JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
  GROUP BY c.Segment
) pct
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
LIMIT 1

UNION ALL

  SELECT c.Segment,
         ((SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,1,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -

  FROM yearmonth ym
  JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'

) pct

LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT j."Date", j.Expense, total.Total AS Total_Jan_Expense
FROM (
  SELECT "Date", SUM(Price * Amount) AS Expense
  FROM transactions_1k
  WHERE CustomerID = (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE (Price * Amount) = 124.05
      AND "Date" = '2012-08-24'
    LIMIT 1
  )
  AND "Date" BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2012-01-31'
  GROUP BY "Date"
) j
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT SUM(Expense) AS Total
  FROM (
    SELECT "Date", SUM(Price * Amount) AS Expense
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE CustomerID = (
      SELECT CustomerID
      FROM transactions_1k
      WHERE (Price * Amount) = 124.05
        AND "Date" = '2012-08-24'
      LIMIT 1
    )
    AND "Date" BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2012-01-31'
    GROUP BY "Date"
  )
) total

GROUP BY p.ProductID, p.Description

SELECT c.CustomerID,
       SUM(t.Price) / SUM(t.Amount) AS avg_price_per_item,
       c.Currency
FROM customers c
JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Currency
ORDER BY SUM(t.Price) DESC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

FROM yearmonth y
JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT t.CustomerID
    FROM "transactions_1k" t
    WHERE t.ProductID = 5
      AND (t.Price / t.Amount) > 29.0
